race.comment: A BM70 over 2350m is worth 50K, and will start the quaddie. MY UNCLE DID IT (15) missed out on a hat-trick when finishing second by just over a length at Donald 3 weeks ago. She drops 4kg, and she should relish the extra trip here. Hard to beat. WUDDZZ (2) ran a much better race for sixth, third up at Terang last time out, and he is perfectly placed with a drop in class here. He has won twice here from 3 starts, and he can figure in the top 3 this time. ARDASHIR (6) went straight up from a maiden win at Pakenham to score immediately there again 12 days ago in BM66 level. He is obviously a tough stayer with plenty of upside, and the hat-trick beckons. CUSTOMER SERVICE (5) seems to prefer some firmer ground, but he was a game winner at Bendigo nearly 6 weeks ago, and he has trialled since then. Stick with him. EMPRESS OF THE SUN (14) stepped up in trip and finished a sound fourth at Morphettville last time out. A wet track is a query, but she can't be left out of any top 4 combos.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial - Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible
